goals: ✅ Steady Sugar Management: Target < 150 mg/dL (Optimized Medication)
✅ Gentle Weight Management: Target -4 to -5 kg in 1 month
✅ Cooling Summer Hydration (Chaach, Jeera Water, Lauki/Tori)
✅ Balanced Nutrition: Focus on Whole Grains & Fresh Greens
✅ Healthy Fats: Controlled usage (Max 3 tsp / 15ml Oil per day)

schedule.label: Wake-up (Cooling Start)
schedule.food: Methi Dana Water (soaked overnight) OR Jeera Pani. (Helps maintain steady morning levels and keeps the body cool)

schedule.label: Breakfast (Light & Protein)
schedule.food: 2 Moong Dal Chillas (made with 1 tsp oil max) + 1 small glass fresh Chaach. (Take Panlipase 10000 with the first bite to aid digestion)

schedule.label: Mid-Morning Refreshment
schedule.food: Roasted Chana or Cucumber slices. + 1 glass Chaach (Buttermilk with jeera, no sugar). (Hydration is key for Daparyl M effectiveness)

schedule.label: Lunch (Balanced Plate)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + 1 katori Dal / Paneer / Sabzi + Fresh Salad + 1 bowl Chaach. (Take Panlipase 10000 with the first bite. Do not skip meals while on Huminsulin)

schedule.label: Evening Soother
schedule.food: 5-6 Soaked Almonds or Sprouted Moong. + 1 cup Chamomile or Tulsi Green Tea (No sugar).

schedule.label: Dinner (Gentle & Light)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + Light Sabzi (Lauki/Tori) OR Vegetable Soup. (Take Panlipase 10000. Keep dinner light for better morning sugar)

recipes.title: 🌾 Summer Multigrain Atta Mix
recipes.details: A cooling blend designed for summer sugar management:
ingredients: 200g Ragi / Bajra - Moderate amount for summer

recipes.title: 🥞 Moong Dal Chilla (Digestion Friendly)
recipes.details: Soak 100g moong dal. Grind into a smooth batter.
ingredients: Add: Grated Lauki (very easy to digest)
Cooking: Use minimal oil (Sarson or Groundnut)

drinks.name: Chamomile Tea
drinks.note: Relaxing and cooling, great for evening

drinks.name: Hydration
drinks.note: Drink 8-10 glasses of water (Essential for Daparyl M)

lifestyle.title: Post-Meal Walk
lifestyle.note: A gentle 10–15 min walk after meals helps steady sugar levels.

lifestyle.title: The Plate Rule
lifestyle.note: 50% Sabzi/Salad, 25% Protein, 25% Roti. Always take Panlipase with meals.

lifestyle.title: Medical Optimization
lifestyle.note: Regular check-ins with the doctor to ensure insulin and medications are perfectly balanced.

lifestyle.title: Consistent Monitoring
lifestyle.note: Track fasting levels and weight weekly to stay on target.

medications.name: Huminsulin
medications.purpose: Rapidly controls severe blood sugar highs (glucose toxicity).

medications.name: Daparyl M (Dapagliflozin + Metformin)
medications.purpose: Improves insulin sensitivity and flushes excess glucose through kidneys.

medications.name: Panlipase 10000
medications.purpose: Pancreatic enzyme replacement for proper nutrient absorption.
